title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 03
desc: Ever heard of enemies turning into lovers? Well, Shashank and Roshni's relationship takes a new turn. But looking at their new forming bond, Ayush and Giya get worried. Find out what decision they take next.

desc: A kiss can change everything. Confused about what they should do next, Shashank and Roshni decide to part ways. Is this the end of their story?

title: Office Ka Pyaar Ep 01
desc: As things take an unexpected turn when Rachit finds himself on a date with the new girl in the office, Kashvi. What starts as a casual meet up in party quickly evolves into something more as they navigate the blurry lines between professional and personal.

title: Office Ka Pyaar Ep 02
desc: when crush breaks your heart. As things take an unexpected turn when Rachit finds out about Kashvi and her true feelings behind their kiss. Ever had a crush in the office who made your heart race, only to break it into a million pieces?
